category_sources: source_facts.description says NeoMutt is an email reader; official NeoMutt guide describes a text-based email client setup and usage.
display_name_sources: Official docs and website use the product name NeoMutt; source_facts.name is neomutt.
docs_sources: Official dedicated documentation domain docs.neomutt.org provides the NeoMutt Guide; it links source and website as official project surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/neomutt/neomutt, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions email reader, Notmuch, and NNTP; official docs include IMAP, SMTP, configuration, commands, and terminal-oriented guide content.
